evals.prompt: Review this repo from a product perspective and tell me the highest priority improvements.
evals.expected_output: Produces a prioritized product review with observable evidence, severity tiers, and a Status line. Does not speculate about users or metrics without grounding.

evals.prompt: Use $ywc-product-review on docs and README only. Avoid code-level implementation review.
evals.expected_output: Limits evidence to the requested docs and README, focuses on product value and positioning, and avoids code-review findings.

evals.prompt: Find growth and user value gaps in this project, but do not invent a roadmap.
evals.expected_output: Reports grounded growth and user-value findings, marks uncertainty, and avoids fabricated roadmap commitments.
